Story Title: Implement automated SOX control testing framework
Story Description: Build a framework that runs configurable control tests nightly against the financial close system, capturing pass/fail evidence and routing exceptions to the audit queue. AC: 100% of in-scope controls covered, evidence retained 7 years, exceptions routed within 4h.
Feature Description: Automate quarterly SOX control testing and exception evidence capture.
Epic Description: Tighten Sarbanes-Oxley control coverage across financial reporting after 2025 PCAOB findings.

Story Title: Build SOX control evidence collection service
Story Description: Service that pulls evidence artifacts (logs, screenshots, query results) on demand for any control test execution. Must support tamper-evident storage and signed audit URLs for regulators.

Epic Description: Tighten Sarbanes-Oxley control coverage across financial reporting after 2025 PCAOB findings.

Story Title: Fix SOX control gap in quarterly reconciliation report
Story Description: Bug: quarterly reconciliation between general ledger and sub-ledgers misses 0.3% of intercompany transactions. Root cause appears to be a timezone offset in the close cutoff. AC: variance reduced to <0.001%.
Feature Description: Automate quarterly SOX control testing and exception evidence capture.
Epic Description: Tighten Sarbanes-Oxley control coverage across financial reporting after 2025 PCAOB findings.

Epic Description: Tighten Sarbanes-Oxley control coverage across financial reporting after 2025 PCAOB findings.
